description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a modern, boxy design and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily composed of brown brickwork, with large rectangular windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A wooden privacy fence encloses a small outdoor deck area, which features palm trees and an exterior staircase leading to the upper level. The front facade includes a black garage door and a main entryway with a small awning above it, flanked by decorative plants. The house sits directly adjacent to a concrete sidewalk, typical of dense urban neighborhoods. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and a fenced outdoor deck with palm trees. The front features a garage, main entry, and urban sidewalk access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, garage door, large windows, sidewalk, and fenced deck with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, and a glimpse of the sidewalk.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden fence, exterior staircase, palm trees, and a small window on the brick wall.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the fenced deck, exterior stairs, palm trees, and the side of the house with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a flat awning, single door, steps, and flanked by decorative plants; integrated garage door.
